interaction_history.summary: Initial onboarding. Customer signed wholesale agreement for barware and kitchen accessories.
Bulk order inquiry — 200 units of assorted glassware for corporate event. Fulfilled under expedited shipping.
Delayed shipment on order 58201437. Customer notified proactively, offered 5% discount on next order.
Customer requested updated product catalog for Q1 2026 planning. Catalog sent same day.
Pricing dispute on order 59843102. Two items charged at retail instead of wholesale rate. Manual credit applied.
Customer placed order 61356291 for wine glasses, stemware rack, corkscrew, and stemless wine glasses set. Total: $212.09.
Customer requested return of stemless wine glasses (Item 4, $14.29 gross). Invoice amended, item removed, totals recalculated.
Support agent raised HelpDesk ticket #1025 for refund processing. Ticket shared with customer via Matrix.
